response: The 2007 documentary "Zoo" was not more successful than the 1998 documentary "Divine Trash." "Zoo" was released in 2007 and premiered at the Sundance Film Festival, where it won one of 16 awards out of 856 candidates. "Divine Trash," directed by Steve Yeager, was released in 1998 and is a documentary about John Waters. There is no information provided that indicates the success of one film over the other.
